title: Verify the CHANNELS consumer boundary
preconditions: A future-consumer contract fixture can inspect versioned reports, snapshots, Restatement differences, explanations, and Attention Item states without UI implementation.
steps: Compare consumer-visible schemas and policy metadata with INSIGHTS results; enumerate available authority; inspect for layout, translation, notification, scheduling, and upstream mutation fields; exercise one-version incompatibility.
expected: CHANNELS can consume exact released analytical semantics only; presentation and delivery concerns remain absent; no analytical-policy or mutation authority leaks; incompatible versions fail cleanly.
